'''''Eyeshine''''' was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Barloz-class medium freighter/Legends|''Barloz''-class freighter]] that was owned by the [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Mal Biron]]. The vessel had been upgraded with the addition of an [[X10-D droid brain]], which helped Biron to operate and maintain the ship effectively. The ship was named for a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] that Biron had once romanced in his younger years.

{{Ship-stub}}
